popularStory.headline: Cockayne Families
popularStory.description:
Is there another Old Derbshire family with such memorabilia for the historian, with so many vicissitudes and so many dramatic episodes, as the Cokaynes? 

Derbyshire provides much of the finest scener …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Cokayne Esquire於1300年出生在英國德比夏爾阿希布恩時，他的父親William Cokayne30歲，母親Sarah De Mercaston25歲。他於1324年與Lettice Withers在英國德比夏爾阿希布恩 希丘特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1369年在他的家鄉享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Cokayne Esquire于1300年出生在英国德比夏爾阿希布恩时，他的父亲William Cokayne30岁，母亲Sarah De Mercaston25岁。他于1324年与Lettice Withers在英国德比夏爾阿希布恩 希丘特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1369年在他的家乡享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cokayne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Cockayne
meanings: English (Midlands and Yorkshire): nickname for a dreamer, from Middle English cokayne ‘cloud-cuckooland’, the name of an imaginary paradise (Old French (pays de) cocaigne, from Middle Low German kōkenje, a diminutive of kōke ‘cake’, since in this land the houses were thought to be made of cake). It may also be a variant of Cocking or from the unflattering Middle English nickname cokin (Old French coquin) ‘disreputable person’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Cokayne Esquire was born in 1300, in Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England, his father, William Cokayne, was 30 and his mother, Sarah De Mercaston, was 25. He married Lettice Withers in 1324, in Ashbourne Circuit, Derbyshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1369, in his hometown, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Cokayne Esquire est né en 1300, à Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, William Cokayne, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Sarah De Mercaston, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Lettice Withers en 1324, à Ashbourne Circuit, Derbyshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1369, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Cokayne Esquire 1300 in Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Cokayne 30 und seine Mutter Sarah De Mercaston 25. Er hat 1324 in Ashbourne Circuit, Derbyshire, England Lettice Withers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1369 im Alter von 69 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Cokayne Esquire è nato il nel 1300 nel Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England, il suo padre, William Cokayne, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Sarah De Mercaston, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Lettice Withers nel 1324, nel Ashbourne Circuit, Derbyshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1369, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Cokayne Esquireが1300年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアアシュボウルンで生まれた時，父William Cokayneは30歳，母Sarah De Mercastonは25歳であった。1324年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアアシュボウルン シルクウイトでLettice Withersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1369年に故郷で69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Cokayne Esquire(이)가 1300년 영국 더비실르 애쉬보우른에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Cokayne(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Sarah De Mercaston(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1324년 영국 더비실르 애쉬보우른 시르쿠이에서 Lettice Withers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1369년 그의 고향에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Cokayne Esquire nasceu em 1300, em Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Cokayne, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Sarah De Mercaston, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Lettice Withers em 1324, em Ashbourne Circuit, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1369, em sua cidade natal, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Cokayne Esquire родился в 1300 г. в местности ашбурн, дирбишир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Cokayne было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah De Mercaston, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Lettice Withers в 1324 г. в местности ашбурн сиркуит, дирбишир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1369 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 69 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Cokayne Esquire nació en 1300, en Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Cokayne, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Sarah De Mercaston, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Lettice Withers en 1324, en Ashbourne Circuit, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1369, en su pueblo, a la edad de 69 años.
